name: claude
description: Claude AI backend via CLI or Anthropic API

backend.description: Backend: cli (Claude Code CLI) or api (Anthropic SDK)

anthropic_api_key.description: Anthropic API Key (required for backend api)

model.description: Claude model to use (haiku, sonnet, opus)

max_retries.description: Maximum number of retries on failure

max_tool_iterations.description: Max tool loop iterations (api backend only)

max_tools.description: Max MCP tools passed to the model, 0 = unlimited (api backend only)

use_pool.description: Enable process pooling for persistent CLI processes (enables streaming tool notifications)

pool_max_processes.description: Max concurrent CLI processes in the pool

notify_tool_use.description: Send tool-use notifications to chat (requires use_pool=true for CLI backend)

cli_meta.token_hint: Run claude setup-token on your local machine, then paste the token (starts with sk-ant-oat01-)
